html:
Exclusive to:

Grit Duster can be crafted at level 1 of the Combriner. When kept in the player’s inventory, it prevents the player from slipping on slippery surfaces.

A Grit Duster lasts for 1.39 minutes and only loses durability while the player is moving on slippery surfaces.

Usage

Grit Grinder

Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Grit Grinder can be crafted at level 2 of the Combriner. When a player runs on slippery surface while carrying a Grit Grinder in their inventory, it spawns grits, which allow all players to not slip while on it. Each grit lasts for 1 minute and protects any player moving on it from Slipping.

Spawning a grit consumes 4% durability from the Grit Grinder, allowing it to spawn a total of 25 grits.

Trivia

  • The Grit Duster and Grinder were added in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Grit Duster
"For when you can't afford to slip up."
Object Info
Does not stack
3 min
Crafting
×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"nonslipgrit"
Exclusive to:
“It's quite gripping!”
–Wilson
“What for? I have the reflexes of a cat!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang never slip! But just in case.”
–Wolfgang
“At least one thing won't slip away from me...”
–Wendy
“TRACTION CONTROL”
–WX-78
“It will enhance my grip, at the cost of my tool's longevity.”
–Wickerbottom
“I would have made a fortune selling this back home.”
–Woodie
“Hmph. And Winona said I have no grit!”
–Maxwell
“With this, my grip shan't falter!”
–Wigfrid
“It makes our spider fingers extra grippy!”
–Webber
“A salty coating for my various utensils.”
–Warly
“No whoops”
–Wormwood
“Better than slipin' and slidin'.”
–Winona
“No slip when I skip!”
–Wortox
“Sticky dust!”
–Wurt
“Heh. My tools won't give me the slip with this!”
–Walter
“I'm not losing my grip just yet!”
–Wanda
Grit Duster can be crafted at level 1 of the Combriner. When kept in the player’s inventory, it prevents the player from slipping on slippery surfaces.
A Grit Duster lasts for 1.39 minutes and only loses durability while the player is moving on slippery surfaces.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Grit Grinder[edit | edit source]

"Re-tread your trail for extra traction."

Grit
Object Info

Miscellaneous
"nonslipgritpool"
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
“Now we're really gaining some traction!”
–Wilson
“Wilson needs this more. Klutz!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang use for clumsy friends.”
–Wolfgang
“I will salt the earth.”
–Wendy
“UPGRADED TRACTION CONTROL”
–WX-78
“I won't have to fear slipping with this sprinkled on the ground.”
–Wickerbottom
“This stuff won't quit!”
–Woodie
“All this salt on the ground is going to ruin my shoes.”
–Maxwell
“Cast it upön the gröund, and thine föoting shall be true.”
–Wigfrid
“We're gonna sprinkle it all over, so nobody slips!”
–Webber
“Perhaps the ground could use a dusting of salt, for texture.”
–Warly
“More no whoops”
–Wormwood
“Reminds me of kitty litter.”
–Winona
“Last time I slided, I nearly dieded. Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Me put sticky dust everywhere!”
–Wurt
“No licking it off the ground, Woby!”
–Walter
“A little traction couldn't hurt.”
–Wanda
Grit Grinder can be crafted at level 2 of the Combriner. When a player runs on slippery surface while carrying a Grit Grinder in their inventory, it spawns grits, which allow all players to not slip while on it. Each grit lasts for 1 minute and protects any player moving on it from Slipping.
Spawning a grit consumes 4% durability from the Grit Grinder, allowing it to spawn a total of 25 grits.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Grit Duster and Grinder were added in the Winter's Feast 2025 update.

'''Grit Duster''' can be crafted at level 1 of the [[Combriner]]. When kept in the player’s inventory, it prevents the player from slipping on [[Slipping|slippery]] surfaces.

A Grit Duster lasts for 1.39 minutes and only loses durability while the player is moving on slippery surfaces.
=={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Salt Crystals
|count1 = 1
|item2 = Grit Duster
|count2 = 1
|tool = Combriner
|result = Grit Grinder
}}
{{clear}}

'''Grit Grinder''' can be crafted at level 2 of the [[Combriner]]. When a player runs on [[Slipping|slippery]] surface while carrying a Grit Grinder in their inventory, it spawns '''grits''', which allow all players to not slip while on it. Each grit lasts for 1 minute and protects any player moving on it from Slipping.

Spawning a grit consumes 4% durability from the Grit Grinder, allowing it to spawn a total of 25 grits.

{{clear}}

* The Grit Duster and Grinder were added in the ''[[Winter's Feast 2025]]'' update.
